category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks best practices in SaltStack; official docs say salt-lint checks Salt State files for best practices and improved behavior.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is salt-lint; official documentation title and project heading use salt-lint.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs documentation is linked to the warpnet/salt-lint GitHub project and includes usage, rules, configuration, and integration docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://github.com/warpnet/salt-lint; official Read the Docs page links to edit/explore code on warpnet/salt-lint.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SaltStack best-practice checking; official docs specify command-line usage and Salt State file linting.
